engine.ladder_reasoning: A restaurant where the visitor decides by browsing menus, photos, hours, location and ambiance — checking a PLACE. The whole site is menu/heritage/hours/map, which IS the decision.

goal.one_action: Reserve a table (secondary: submit an event/catering inquiry or book a venue tour)

structure.archetype_note: Classic multipage restaurant/venue: home hero + menus + location/hours + plan-your-visit + catering/events inquiry, with a blog (Telegraph) and dated bulletin. Reservations offloaded to Resy, ordering/gift cards to Toast.

mapped.observed_as: Experience the best in Tallahassee Dining
An Iconic Setting for Your Next Occasion
THE EDISON TELEGRAPH: Essays in Hospitality (blog carousel)
VISITING WITH A GROUP? / QUICK ACCESS grids
Let's Begin Planning Your Unforgettable Event

unmapped.observed: Bulletin — dated event/announcement feed (Restaurant Week, closures, concerts)
unmapped.why_no_fit: A standing dated announcement/event list is neither an event ticketing schedule nor a blog; sectionList has no dated-notice feed

unmapped.observed: SCHEDULE A TOUR — inline Calendly widget
unmapped.why_no_fit: A single-step booking embed isn't a canonical section; behaves as a delegated form
Not pricing and not generic features — a venue-capacity spec grid unique to event venues

proposed_new.name: external-booking-redirect
proposed_new.evidence: Primary RESERVE A TABLE CTA and the top announcement banner hand off to a third-party reservation engine (Resy: resy.com/cities/tallahassee-fl/venues/the-edison); no on-site scheduling for dining reservations.

confidence.why: fetch_quality=full; 5 pages captured in detail with CTAs, forms, embeds and proof enumerated. Restaurant place-engine read is unambiguous.

gap_findings: Restaurant reservation redirect to Resy/Toast is a hospitality analogue of the appointment external-booking-redirect family — vocab has no dining-reservation notion.
'menu-list' (multi-menu with PDF links + hours per service) has no capability/section representation for the place engine.
Event-venue subsite (capacity-spec cards + service-style/bar-package inquiry form + Calendly tour) is a second conversion path grafted onto a place site — packages+lead-form only partly express it.
'Bulletin' dated-announcement feed and a blog (Telegraph) coexist; sectionList collapses both into miscellaneous.
